description_long: This is a modern, three-seat sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a solid dark gray fabric. The sofa features three large, loose back cushions and three seat cushions, all of which appear to be plush and comfortable. Two elongated lumbar pillows are placed along the seat, adding extra support and a touch of style. The armrests are straight, low, and squared, matching the height of the backrest and maintaining a clean, boxy silhouette. The sofa stands on six slender, exposed metal legs with a matte black finish, providing stability and a contemporary look. The upholstery is smooth and uniform, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, emphasizing its sleek and understated aesthetic.
description: A modern, dark gray three-seat sofa with loose cushions, straight low armrests, and six slender black metal legs. The design is minimalist, with smooth upholstery and a clean, boxy silhouette.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sofa's straight, low armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the three large, loose back cushions and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the straight armrest and cushion depth.
description_view_3: Front view showing all three seat and back cushions, two lumbar pillows, and the open seating area.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose back cushions and three seat cushions, all uniform in size, with two elongated lumbar pillows placed along the seat; cushions are not attached and are arranged in a linear, evenly spaced configuration.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, low, and squared armrests, matching the height of the backrest, with no visible padding or decorative elements; minimalist and boxy in profile.
attribute_leg_design: Six slender, exposed metal legs with a matte black finish, positioned at the four corners and two central points for support; legs are straight and modern in style.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest formed by three large, loose cushions; continuous in structure with no visible tufting or segmentation beyond the cushions themselves.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, decorative stitching, or textural detailing.
